red_lines: Trade deals that undermine Canadian industry
core_narratives: Standing firm against US pressure while maintaining alliance

decision_history.event_description: US imposed 25% tariffs on Canadian goods and Trump made provocative comments about Canada as 51st state
decision_history.decision_taken: Imposed retaliatory tariffs on US goods, rallied domestic unity, accelerated trade diversification with EU and Indo-Pacific
decision_history.outcome: Strong domestic approval, strained US relationship, accelerated non-US trade deals

decision_history.event_description: Won snap election on platform of economic sovereignty
decision_history.decision_taken: Called election framing ballot as choice about Canadian sovereignty, leveraged anti-US tariff sentiment
decision_history.outcome: Liberal majority government, strong mandate for economic independence agenda

cultural_context.domestic_power_base: Liberal Party, urban professionals, central Canada, climate-conscious voters
